tutorial.title: Welcome to House
tutorial.subtitle: Learn the basics in a few guided steps.
tutorial.intro: House keeps all your household knowledge in one place. This tutorial walks you through the essentials—no technical background required.
tutorial.stepsTitle: Four simple steps to get going
tutorial.stepsDescription: Follow these actions in order or pick the one you need. Every screen is designed to work great on your phone.
tutorial.steps.createHousehold.title: Create or join your household
tutorial.steps.createHousehold.descripti: Start by creating a household or joining one you have been invited to. Everything you store stays private to the members of that household.
tutorial.steps.captureInteraction.title: Capture your first interaction
tutorial.steps.captureInteraction.descri: Log a note, call, task, or expense. Add attachments or tags so the context is easy to find later.
tutorial.steps.organizeZones.title: Map the rooms and systems you manage
tutorial.steps.organizeZones.description: Add zones for each room, appliance, or area. You can take photos and link documents to keep visual references close.
tutorial.steps.inviteAndPlan.title: Invite people and plan the work
tutorial.steps.inviteAndPlan.description: Invite family members or teammates, assign tasks, and follow project timelines together.
tutorial.featuresTitle: What you can do in House
tutorial.featuresDescription: Each feature is built to stay clear on small screens and accessible with assistive technologies.
tutorial.features.interactions.title: Track every interaction
tutorial.features.interactions.descripti: Notes, calls, expenses, and reminders live together so you can replay the story of any project.
tutorial.features.zones.title: Organise your home visually
tutorial.features.zones.description: Create colour-coded zones, nest areas, and keep quick stats about what matters in each space.
tutorial.features.documents.title: Store files and photos safely
tutorial.features.documents.description: Upload warranties, invoices, or photos. Everything is linked to your interactions for context.
tutorial.features.projects.title: Plan projects end to end
tutorial.features.projects.description: Group related interactions, track budgets, and monitor progress without opening another tool.
tutorial.tipsDescription: These small habits keep the app friendly for everyone in your household.
tutorial.tips.items.mobile: Use the main navigation button on mobile to open the menu, then choose the section you need.
tutorial.tips.items.sections: Every screen has a short description at the top. Read it to understand what you can do here.
tutorial.tips.items.support: Look for buttons with clear labels: they describe the action before you confirm it.
tutorial.tips.items.access: Text sizes and contrasts follow accessibility guidelines. Zoom in or use screen readers without losing clarity.
tutorial.actionsTitle: Ready to take the next step?
tutorial.actionsDescription: Jump straight to a key area. You can always return to this tutorial from the menu.

projects.aiInfo.description: The AI assistant will automatically analyze your project elements (assigned zones, planned tasks, deadlines, budget, and tags) to generate or enhance the description. This feature saves you time by creating a structured and coherent project summary.
